$comment: Project-shared settings (committed). Hard-enforcement layer for the auto-publish chain: a PreToolUse hook blocks forbidden git commands (force-push / reset --hard <remote> / delete remote branch / push --mirror) before the Bash tool runs, so the publish/auto-deliver engines' git red lines are physically enforced, not merely requested in a prompt. Personal overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).
